def load_and_process(config_path):
    with open(config_path, "r") as f:
        version = f.readline().strip()

    with open(config_path, "r") as f:
        content = f.read()

    with open(config_path, "r") as f:
        line_count = len(f.readlines())

    with open(config_path, "r") as f:
        sections = [line for line in f if line.startswith("[")]

    return {
        "version": version,
        "content": content,
        "line_count": line_count,
        "sections": sections,
    }
